assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_023",
  "rule_id": "Ensure All User Initialization Files Have Mode 0740 Or Less Permissive",
  "category": "requires_human_review",
  "confidence": 0.8,
  "rationale": "Changing user initialization file permissions could potentially cause issues with user access or system configuration, and the remediation script modifies files for all interactive users, which may have unintended consequences.",
  "risk_factors": ["potential access issues", "system configuration changes"],
  "safe_next_steps": ["review the list of affected users and files", "test the remediation script in a non-production environment"],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": true
}
